project.name: extension-hub
project.description: Multi-agent communication hub — AI agents (Antigravity, Codex via MCP) collaborate on code review via event-driven architecture
project.status: Phase 1 Complete, Phase 2 In Progress, Phase 4+5 Reviewed

tech_stack.testing: node:test (built-in) — 30 session + 13 server + 5 rebuttal tests passing

features.name: Phase 1: Core Hub
features.description: HubServer, Session, EventStore, WebSocket streaming, REST API, Dashboard UI — 172/172 tests

features.name: Live Debug Demo
features.description: live-debug-demo.js — spawns both CLIs, streams to dashboard, writes .feedback inbox

features.name: Plan Consultation
features.description: consult-plan.js — asks both CLIs for plan opinions via Hub server

features.name: Phase 2.03: MCP Adapter + Codex Review
features.description: MCP bridge adapter for Codex CLI, session-scoped review via Hub server API

features.name: Phase 2.04: Session Label + Evaluate/Rerun
features.description: Human-readable session labels, evaluate→rerun feedback chain, auto-label on retry, createRetry forwards all config

features.name: Code Annotation Viewer (Phase 04 Plan)
features.description: phase-04-code-annotation.md — file viewer with syntax highlighting, IDE links, XSS safety. Reviewed through Codex rounds.

features.name: Phase 4+5 Codex Review Loop
features.description: 5-round Codex review of server.js: 8 bugs fixed (session save, start() reject, path traversal, bind 127.0.0.1, isFile check, removeListener). 8/8 rebuttals won.

decisions.reason: Codex critique round 3 — client clocks unreliable
Prevent agents from modifying source during review

decisions.decision: Session label field for human-readable tracking
decisions.reason: UUID session IDs impossible to track. Label shows 'Review Phase-04 Round 1' in dropdown.

decisions.decision: Evaluate→rerun API chain for review feedback
decisions.reason: Each round was independent, Codex never received agree/disagree. Now: POST /evaluate → POST /rerun.
Old createRetry only forwarded prompt. Now forwards agentId, reviewOptions, snapshotPath, round, label.

gotchas: Check combinedBytes (stdout+stderr) not just stdoutBytes for pass/fail
Codex '9router' provider needs explicit OPENAI_API_KEY env var when spawned from Node.js
Claude Code -p mode with --output-format json returns structured_output field, not result text
Claude Code exit code null is normal — check is_error:false instead
raw_output broadcast should NOT truncate (was 1200 char limit, caused data loss)
Duplicate method definitions in JS class: later definition silently overrides earlier one at runtime. TS lint shows 'Duplicate function implementation' but easy to miss.
Rerun with rebuttals context can cause Codex to return 0 findings (too aggressive context). Fresh run on same file produces 7-8 findings. Rerun prompt needs tuning.
PowerShell ConvertTo-Json truncates nested objects. Use -Depth 3+ for complex request bodies.
Claude Code CLI removed from project — only Codex via MCP adapter now
path.join + startsWith can be tricked by sibling dirs sharing prefix (ui vs ui-secret). Fix: startsWith(dir + path.sep)
http.Server.listen(port) without host binds to 0.0.0.0 not 127.0.0.1. Always specify '127.0.0.1' for localhost-only.
removeAllListeners('error') removes ALL error handlers, not just yours. Use named function + removeListener(fn).
existsSync returns true for directories. Always check statSync().isFile() before createReadStream.
Codex MCP adapter can stall — Hub watchdog detects via idleMs > 45s. Fix: restart Hub server.
Codex keeps re-raising the same finding with different framing after withdrawal. Stream error raised 3x, withdrawn 3x.
PowerShell `exit` in inline code (run_command) kills entire shell process. Use `break` + `$result` variable instead. Only use `exit` in .ps1 script files.
conventions: Agent feedback in .feedback/, run logs in .agents/runs/
File splitting: warn >200 LOC, must split >300 LOC
Full combined output saved to tmp/consult-*-combined.txt
